skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Ingest data from Notion, Slack, and Outlook into velo-brain. Use when syncing external data sources.

skills.name: client-brief
skills.description: Compile everything we know about a client before a meeting. Brain-first research + external enrichment. Use when preparing for client meetings.

skills.name: tone-of-voice
skills.description: Analyze and apply a team member's writing style. Build tone profiles from Slack/email, write drafts that sound like the person. Use when writing customer emails, proposals, or LinkedIn posts.

skills.name: weekly-digest
skills.description: Weekly intelligence digest: project status, pipeline changes, shipped features, team capacity. Use on Fridays or Mondays.

skills.name: boot
skills.description: Session bootstrap: load conventions, corrections, hot cache from brain. Run at session start and after context compaction.

skills.name: recall
skills.description: Multi-hop retrieval: deep context search that follows graph links 1-2 hops. Use when you need the full picture, not just one page.
